calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Intructions For Settlement Of Account
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Jerrilyn Yackamouih (Trustee). Stephen McDonagh for Russell Geneve (Objector).

Mr. Byrne stated that they have resolved everything and that it is their intent to dismiss the petition. In addition, Mr. Byrne stated that the house was sold, that distributions have been made, and that there is an accounting issue but that they do not feel that they need Court supervision. The Petition for Instructions for Settlement of Account was taken off calendar at the request of both Counsel.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Verified Petition For Intructions For Settlement Of Account

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Byrne for Jerrilyn Yackamouth (Petitioner/Trustee). Stephen McDonagh for Russell Geneve (Beneficiary/Objector).

The Petition for Instructions was continued to October 31, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of the accounting and for Counsel to continue to work on resolution.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.
